response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript/Node.js and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI solutions, RAG architectures, vector databases, or cloud-platform AI system design. The GenAI experience appears recent (~6 months) and the role demands proven staff-level AI delivery to enterprise customers, which is not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js experience plus polyglot background (Python-adjacent skills, DLang, C++, Java)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, teaching/mentoring through workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years building production GenAI/AI solutions — AI exposure looks limited to ~6 months
Missing explicit RAG, vector database, and LLM evaluation/observability experience
No clear evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed enterprise delivery

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB/cloud AI architecture evidence
